items.title: Archer returns as England play Sri Lanka in first T20 international LIVE!
Lecky Watson fancied to outrun is odds in Irish Gold Cup
items.summary: Declan Rix and Sam Boswell join host Kate Tracey ahead of the Dublin Racing Festival, which takes place at Leopardstown this weekend.

items.title: PSV speelt tegen Feyenoord met Ronaldo-badge op shirt
items.summary: PSV speelt zondagmiddag in de topper tegen Feyenoord met een speciale badge op het shirt. De fans konden stemmen op dé PSV-legende en kozen massaal voor Ronaldo Luís Nazário de Lima. Daarom zal er van hem een badge op het shirt te zien zijn.

items.title: Fulham smijt met miljoenen door te shoppen bij Manchester City
items.summary: Fulham heeft de komst van Oscar Bobb bevestigd. The Cottagers nemen de buitenspeler voor tientallen miljoenen over van Manchester City.

items.title: Ajax hoopt snel op duidelijkheid uit Brazilië
items.summary: Ajax heeft zich toch opnieuw gemeld voor JP Chermont. De club wil de Braziliaanse back voor aankomende dinsdag, als de transfermarkt sluit, in Nederland hebben en hoopt daar snel duidelijkheid over te krijgen.

items.title: Benfica v Madrid again in Champions League; Bobb joins Fulham for £27m: football – live
items.summary: ⚽ News and previews heading into the weekend’s action ⚽ Premier League: 10 things to look out for | Mail Dom Mikel Arteta and Eddie Howe will be speaking soon. Two titans of management speak. This was interesting from Slot. He was asked why Premier League teams are becoming so dominant in Europe, with Liverpool particularly impressive in the Champions League this season especially compared to many of their domestic showings. See also: Spurs. Continue reading...

items.title: Barça's Raphinha: I deserved to win Ballon d'Or
items.summary: Barcelona forward Raphinha said he was upset that he didn't win the 2025 Ballon d'Or award after his outstanding season.

items.title: Sources: Benzema 'disrespected' by Al Ittihad offe...
items.summary: Karim Benzema has felt disrespected after the contract extension offered to him by Al Ittihad, sources have told ESPN.

items.title: USMNT's Freeman completes Villarreal transfer
items.summary: Right back Alex Freeman, a hopeful for this year's U.S. World Cup roster, transferred Thursday to Spain's Villarreal from Major League Soccer's Orlando City.

items.title: Poch: WC ticket prices nothing to do with USMNT
items.summary: United States coach Mauricio Pochettino said it was not his job -- nor that of his players -- to evaluate or weigh in on the price of tickets for this summer's World Cup.

items.title: Fulham sign Man City winger Bobb for £27m
items.summary: Fulham sign Norway winger Oscar Bobb from Manchester City for £27m on a five-and-a-half-year contract.

items.title: Eén in het oog springend affiche in tussenronde Europa League
items.summary: De UEFA heeft vrijdagmiddag de loting voor de tussenronde van de Europa League verricht. Nottingham Forest staat tegenover Fenerbahçe en Celtic kruist de degens met VfB Stuttgart. De wedstrijden in de tussenronde worden in februari afgewerkt.

items.title: Celtic to play Stuttgart & Forest face Fenerbahce
items.summary: Celtic will play Stuttgart and Nottingham Forest will face Fenerbahce in two-legged play-offs to reach the last 16 of the Europa League.

items.title: Arteta compares Arsenal’s Max Dowman with young Messi as teenager commits future
items.summary: 16-year-old signs pre-agreement for first pro contract ‘What Max has done age 15, I haven’t seen before’ Mikel Arteta has likened Max Dowman to a young Lionel Messi after the teenager committed his future to Arsenal. Dowman, who in November became the youngest player to play in the Champions League at 15 years and 308 days, has signed a pre-agreement for his first professional contract when he turns 17 in December. It is understood several clubs were interested in the England Under-19s forward but there was never real doubt over whether the player who joined Arsenal aged six would stay. Continue reading...

items.title: Kleurrijke Maupay rekent na transfer af met social media-beheerder Sevilla
items.summary: Neal Maupay heeft de social media-beheerder van Sevilla te grazen genomen. Voor de grap dan, want de winteraanwinst van de Andalusiërs had nog een appeltje te schillen met de jongen die hem afgelopen zomer met een knipoog te kakken zette op X.

items.title: Real Madrid face Benfica, Mourinho rematch in UCL ...
items.summary: After a dramatic League Phase clash, Madrid and Benfica meet again in the knockout playoff round. Elsewhere, holders PSG face fellow French side Monaco, while Newcastle meet Qarabag.

items.title: Forest to face Fenerbahce as Celtic draw Stuttgart in Europa League play-offs
items.summary: Nottingham Forest will face Turkish giants Fenerbahce in the Europa League knockout play-off round, as Celtic were drawn against German side Stuttgart.

items.title: The Arsenal fan psychodrama: Big Defeat Headloss hits hard after United setback | Chris Godfrey
items.summary: I played out a torturous, all-too-familar dance after the Gunners’ title-race stumble. But if we’re suffering like this in January, how will we feel in May? I sometimes joke that I’m not sure I actually like football, just Arsenal. Hate-watching rivals aside, if a game doesn’t concern the Gunners it probably doesn’t concern me, such is my one-club tunnel vision. Even then, there are occasions where my love of Arsenal appears debatable. As a friend recently put it to me: “I’ve watched Arsenal games with you. I’m not sure you like Arsenal and yet you’re possibly the most fervent Gooner I know.” Ah, the torturous dance between joy and torment. I relived it again last Sunday evening, when Arsenal lost to Manchester United. On paper, it should have been simple enough to compartmentalise: you can’t win them all and we’re still four points clear at the top of the league table and looking strong in all three cups. And yet, for the first time this season, I succumbed to true result-induced head loss. Continue reading...

items.title: Newcastle draw Qarabag in CL play-offs with Benfica-Real Madrid rematch
items.summary: Newcastle have been drawn against Qarabag in their Champions League knockout play-off tie, while Benfica and Real Madrid will face each other again after a dramatic end to their league phase tie on Wednesday.

items.title: Benfica meet Real in play-offs after dramatic league phase encounter
items.summary: Benfica will face Real Madrid in the Champions League play-offs just three weeks after their dramatic league phase encounter.
